definitions: Small New World monkeys of the family Callitrichidae, native to South America, known for their small size, long tails, and claw-like nails.
Any of several small, arboreal, long-tailed South American monkeys of the genus Callithrix and related genera, having soft fur and often tufted ears.
examples: The zoo acquired a new group of marmosets.
Marmosets are known for their social behavior.
The research focused on the diet of wild marmosets.
